channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Socialist Movement Now Targets Colorado
item.description: A 29-year-old socialist with an AOC-like style is challenging a 15-term Democratic congresswoman in Denver.

item.title: Venezuelans Search Earthquake Ruins as Focus Shifts to Humanitarian Crisis
item.description: With the rescue window closing, Venezuelans on Monday continued searching through rubble from last week's powerful earthquake.

item.title: U.S. Power, Not International Law, Determines Strait of Hormuz Access
item.description: The waterway has historically remained open because Tehran understood America would not tolerate Iranian restrictions.

item.title: Nursing Gains 'Professional' Loan Status After Ruling, Theology Dropped
item.description: Graduate nursing and physical therapy students can now access higher federal loans, while theology programs are excluded.
